translatedText: Karne ya 1 KK - Jitu la Karne ya 1

sourceText: From a young age, Peter endured intense court intrigues and instability. The immense human and material costs of the protracted Great Northern War also inflicted great suffering during his reign.
translatedText: Tangu utotoni, Peter alivumilia fitina kali za mahakama na ukosefu wa utulivu. Gharama kubwa za kibinadamu na mali za Vita Kuu ya Kaskazini iliyoendelea pia zilisababisha mateso makubwa wakati wa utawala wake.

sourceText: With a strong will and a deep understanding of Western culture, he implemented sweeping military, administrative, and cultural reforms. Through relentless effort and strategic campaigns, he secured victory in war, founded a new capital, and significantly boosted Russia's power.
translatedText: Kwa nia thabiti na uelewa wa kina wa utamaduni wa Magharibi, alitekeleza mageuzi makubwa ya kijeshi, kiutawala na kitamaduni. Kupitia juhudi na kampeni za kimkakati, alipata ushindi katika vita, akaanzisha mji mkuu mpya, na akaongeza nguvu ya Urusi kwa kiasi kikubwa.

sourceText: As a German princess married into the Russian imperial family, she endured a loveless marriage and political isolation. Her ascension to the throne involved a coup, which led to ongoing legitimacy challenges and numerous rebellion attempts.
translatedText: Binti wa kifalme wa Ujerumani alipoolewa katika familia ya kifalme ya Urusi, alivumilia ndoa isiyo na upendo na kutengwa kisiasa. Kupanda kwake kwenye kiti cha enzi kulihusisha mapinduzi, ambayo yalisababisha changamoto za uhalali zinazoendelea na majaribio mengi ya uasi.

sourceText: Through exceptional political acumen and diplomatic skill, she garnered the support of the Russian nobility and successfully executed a coup to claim the throne. She actively embraced Enlightenment principles, focusing on legal reforms, educational advancements, and the promotion of arts and culture. By strengthening the military and expanding the empire's borders, she solidified Russia's position as a major European power.
translatedText: Kupitia ufahamu wa kipekee wa kisiasa na ustadi wa kidiplomasia, alipata uungwaji mkono wa wakuu wa Urusi na akafanikiwa kutekeleza mapinduzi ya kudai kiti cha enzi. Alikubali kwa bidii kanuni za Kutaalamika, akizingatia mageuzi ya kisheria, maendeleo ya elimu, na ukuzaji wa sanaa na utamaduni. Kwa kuimarisha jeshi na kupanua mipaka ya ufalme huo, aliimarisha msimamo wa Urusi kama nguvu kuu ya Uropa.
Karne ya 6-5 KK (Kipindi cha Masika na Vuli)

sourceText: During World War I, I worked in a casualty clearing station and witnessed the horrific suffering of soldiers succumbing to infection. The antiseptics we had then were of limited use and often did more harm than good. Later, in the early days of penicillin, there were significant challenges in fully recognizing its potential and bringing it to widespread use.
translatedText: Wakati wa Vita vya Kwanza vya Ulimwengu, nilifanya kazi katika kituo cha kusafisha majeruhi na nikaona mateso ya kutisha ya askari walioambukizwa. Dawa tulizokuwa nazo wakati huo hazikutumika sana na mara nyingi zilikuwa na madhara zaidi kuliko manufaa. Baadaye, katika siku za mwanzo za penicillin, kulikuwa na changamoto kubwa katika kutambua kikamilifu uwezo wake na kuleta matumizi makubwa.

sourceText: I dedicated myself to bacteriology, seeking effective ways to combat infections. Through careful observation of a chance contamination in my laboratory, I identified the antibacterial properties of penicillin. I persevered in studying its effects, developing methods for its cultivation and purification. Collaboration with colleagues helped demonstrate its clinical value and paved the way for mass production, saving innumerable lives.
translatedText: Nilijitolea kwa bacteriology, kutafuta njia bora za kupambana na maambukizi. Kupitia uchunguzi wa uangalifu wa uwezekano wa uchafuzi katika maabara yangu, nilitambua sifa za antibacterial za penicillin. Nilidumu katika kusoma athari zake, nikitengeneza mbinu za ukulima na utakaso wake. Ushirikiano na wenzake ulisaidia kuonyesha thamani yake ya kimatibabu na kuweka njia ya uzalishaji kwa wingi, kuokoa maisha yasiyohesabika.

sourceText: Born illegitimate, orphaned at a young age, and struggling with poverty, he faced constant political opposition and personal scandals.
translatedText: Alizaliwa haramu, yatima katika umri mdogo, na akipambana na umaskini, alikabiliwa na upinzani wa kisiasa wa mara kwa mara na kashfa za kibinafsi.

sourceText: Through exceptional intellect and an indomitable will, he pursued his education and dedicated himself to military service. He leveraged his talents for his country, overcoming adversity to become a pivotal figure in America's founding.
translatedText: Kupitia akili ya kipekee na utashi usiozuilika, alifuatilia elimu yake na kujitolea kwa utumishi wa kijeshi. Alitumia vipaji vyake kwa ajili ya nchi yake, akishinda dhiki na kuwa mtu muhimu katika kuanzishwa kwa Amerika.

sourceText: He endured rigorous training to become a printer amidst childhood poverty and his father's opposition. He also faced numerous challenges, including business disputes with his brother, the death of his wife, and prolonged separations from his family due to his political activities.
translatedText: Alistahimili mafunzo makali hadi kuwa mpiga chapa katikati ya umaskini wa utotoni na upinzani wa baba yake. Pia alikumbana na changamoto nyingi, zikiwemo migogoro ya kibiashara na kaka yake, kifo cha mkewe, na kutengana kwa muda mrefu na familia yake kutokana na shughuli zake za kisiasa.

sourceText: Franklin overcame hardships through continuous self-improvement and diligence. He acquired knowledge through self-study, successfully led various businesses, and contributed to community development by organizing civic groups. His exceptional diplomacy and foresight played a crucial role in American independence and nation-building.
translatedText: Franklin alishinda magumu kwa kuendelea kujiboresha na bidii. Alipata maarifa kupitia kujisomea, akaongoza biashara mbalimbali kwa mafanikio, na akachangia maendeleo ya jamii kwa kuandaa vikundi vya kiraia. Diplomasia yake ya kipekee na uwezo wa kuona mbele ulichukua jukumu muhimu katika uhuru wa Marekani na ujenzi wa taifa.

sourceText: Bacon struggled constantly between his political ambitions and scholarly pursuits. He faced numerous political crises due to power struggles and envious rivals, ultimately being convicted of bribery, imprisoned, and then released, enduring significant hardships.
translatedText: Bacon alijitahidi kila wakati kati ya matamanio yake ya kisiasa na shughuli za kielimu. Alikabiliwa na migogoro mingi ya kisiasa kutokana na kung’ang’ania madaraka na wapinzani wenye kijicho, hatimaye kutiwa hatiani kwa hongo, kufungwa, na kisha kuachiliwa, akivumilia magumu makubwa.

sourceText: Despite his political downfall, Bacon never lost his passion for learning. In seclusion, he completed great works like 'Novum Organum,' further developing his philosophy and leaving an immortal legacy that profoundly influenced posterity. His recovery lay in his indomitable will to pursue knowledge without ceasing, even amidst setbacks.
translatedText: Licha ya kuanguka kwake kisiasa, Bacon hakuwahi kupoteza shauku yake ya kujifunza. Kwa kujitenga, alikamilisha kazi nzuri kama 'Novum Organum,' akiendeleza zaidi falsafa yake na kuacha urithi usioweza kufa ambao uliathiri sana kizazi. Kupona kwake kulikuwa katika utashi wake usio na kifani wa kutafuta maarifa bila kukoma, hata katikati ya vikwazo.

sourceText: Suffered from smallpox in childhood, leaving him with poor eyesight and deformed fingers. He also endured his father's disappearance and his mother's accusation of witchcraft. Financial hardships and religious persecution were constant companions.
translatedText: Aliteswa na ndui utotoni, akimwacha na macho duni na vidole vilivyoharibika. Pia alivumilia kutoweka kwa baba yake na shutuma za mama yake za uchawi. Shida za kifedha na mateso ya kidini yalikuwa masahaba wa kudumu.

sourceText: Overcame these adversities through deep faith and unwavering perseverance. He meticulously analyzed Tycho Brahe's extensive observational data to formulate his laws of planetary motion, employing mathematics and physics to unravel the universe's secrets.
translatedText: Alishinda dhiki hizi kupitia imani ya kina na ustahimilivu usioyumbayumba. Alichanganua kwa kina data ya uchunguzi wa kina wa Tycho Brahe ili kuunda sheria zake za mwendo wa sayari, akitumia hisabati na fizikia kufunua siri za ulimwengu.

sourceText: Chronic back pain since childhood, survival of the PT-109 sinking during WWII, and immense pressure during crises like the Cuban Missile Crisis.
translatedText: Maumivu sugu ya mgongo tangu utotoni, kunusurika kwa ajali ya PT-109 iliyozama wakati wa WWII, na shinikizo kubwa wakati wa migogoro kama Mgogoro wa Kombora la Kuba.

sourceText: He endured chronic pain with remarkable resilience and a strong will. The trauma of war deepened his commitment to peace. In political crises, he responded with calm deliberation and decisive action.
translatedText: Alivumilia maumivu ya kudumu kwa ustahimilivu wa ajabu na nia kali. Jeraha la vita lilizidisha kujitolea kwake kwa amani. Katika mizozo ya kisiasa, alijibu kwa tafakari ya utulivu na hatua madhubuti.

sourceText: The early death of her father, her mother's overbearing control, political instability in her early reign, and the profound grief and prolonged mourning following the sudden death of her beloved husband, Prince Albert.
translatedText: Kifo cha mapema cha baba yake, udhibiti mkali wa mama yake, ukosefu wa utulivu wa kisiasa katika utawala wake wa mapema, na huzuni kubwa na maombolezo ya muda mrefu kufuatia kifo cha ghafla cha mume wake mpendwa, Prince Albert.

sourceText: Despite her personal tragedy, she resolutely continued her duties as monarch, upholding Prince Albert's vision for public works, arts, and sciences. She maintained stability within the British Empire and became a symbol of endurance and duty through her frugal and exemplary life, earning the respect of her subjects.
translatedText: Licha ya msiba wake wa kibinafsi, aliendelea na majukumu yake kama mfalme, akishikilia maono ya Prince Albert kwa kazi za umma, sanaa, na sayansi. Alidumisha utulivu ndani ya Milki ya Uingereza na akawa ishara ya uvumilivu na wajibu kupitia maisha yake yasiyo na adabu na ya kupigiwa mfano, akipata heshima ya raia wake.

sourceText: Jefferson grappled with the profound contradiction of owning slaves while espousing principles of liberty, faced intense political rivalries, and endured personal tragedies.
translatedText: Jefferson alikabiliana na mkanganyiko mkubwa wa kumiliki watumwa huku akishikilia kanuni za uhuru, alikabiliana na ushindani mkali wa kisiasa, na kuvumilia majanga ya kibinafsi.

sourceText: He sought solace and guidance in Enlightenment ideals, reason, and education, tirelessly working to advance his vision for the nation despite these challenges.
translatedText: Alitafuta faraja na mwongozo katika maadili ya Kutaalamika, sababu, na elimu, akifanya kazi bila kuchoka ili kuendeleza maono yake kwa taifa licha ya changamoto hizo.

sourceText: Witnessing the brutal reality of my homeland being plundered by Japanese imperialism and the sacrifice of many comrades who fought for independence through armed struggle was a profound pain. Furthermore, during my imprisonment after capture, I endured severe torture and harsh conditions.
translatedText: Kushuhudia uhalisi wa kikatili wa nchi yangu ya asili kuporwa na ubeberu wa Japani na kujitoa mhanga kwa wandugu wengi waliopigania uhuru kupitia mapambano ya kutumia silaha kulikuwa maumivu makali. Zaidi ya hayo, nilipokuwa gerezani baada ya kukamatwa, nilivumilia mateso makali na hali ngumu.

sourceText: Even in prison, I did not lose sight of my ideals, authoring 'The Theory of East Asian Peace.' I steadfastly held onto my convictions for national independence and peace in East Asia, striving to leave hope for future generations.
translatedText: Hata gerezani, sikupoteza mwelekeo wangu, nikiandika 'Nadharia ya Amani ya Asia Mashariki.' Nilishikilia kwa uthabiti imani yangu ya uhuru wa kitaifa na amani katika Asia Mashariki, nikijitahidi kuacha matumaini kwa vizazi vijavyo.

sourceText: As a woman in a patriarchal society, she faced immense political barriers and constant opposition from established powers. She navigated treacherous court politics, rivalries, and accusations, including those surrounding the deaths of her own children, to secure and maintain her position.
translatedText: Kama mwanamke katika jamii ya mfumo dume, alikumbana na vikwazo vikubwa vya kisiasa na upinzani wa mara kwa mara kutoka kwa mamlaka zilizowekwa. Alipitia siasa za hila za mahakama, mashindano, na mashtaka, ikiwa ni pamoja na yale yanayozunguka vifo vya watoto wake mwenyewe, ili kupata na kudumisha cheo chake.
